title: Use openai-codex provider IDs for Pi runner routing
description: Correct Pi runner guidance and diagnostics so Codex subscription/OAuth models use openai-codex/<model>, not separately billed openai/<model>. Warn when Pi Orchestrator config or environment overrides select openai/*.
notes: 2026-07-13 09:45 - Live credential check: openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini:low replied OK with stopReason=stop. Standard openai/gpt-5-nano returned quota exceeded; that provider is not the runner path.
acceptance_criteria: pi-runner.md examples use openai-codex provider IDs; dry-run reports a warning for configured openai/* models; a live openai-codex model smoke request succeeds.
closed_reason: Completed: Pi runner examples now use openai-codex IDs, docs distinguish Codex OAuth from separately billed OpenAI API, and dry-run warns on openai/* routing. Live openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini smoke request passed.
